acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Runbook conventions were read before implementation.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: docs/ORCHESTRATION.md and docs/LINUX_ORCHESTRATOR.md were read before edits.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: realWorldValidation.status accepts exactly passed, not_required, or blocked.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: scripts/qd-report-check/common.sh contains the shared status predicate and error message for passed, not_required, or blocked.
evidence/m4-qd-realworld-blocked-status-contract/commands.log records the /tmp unexpected_status probe producing validator_error_count=1.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The existing m4-nightly-full-workflow-dispatch completion and audit reports use blocked for their required but credential-blocked real-world validation.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: reports/qd/m4-nightly-full-workflow-dispatch/completion.json and reports/qd/m4-nightly-full-workflow-dispatch/audit.json both set realWorldValidation.status to blocked.
evidence/m4-qd-realworld-blocked-status-contract/commands.log records nix develop -c just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, and git diff --check passing.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report metadata validation only; Linux validation passed and macOS validation is not required.
